subject: agent.deliberation.inbox
message:
**Optimist (Turn 1):**

Modern event-driven architecture with NATS JetStream provides exactly the guarantees AlertHub needs. The ecosystem has matured significantly, and the K8s operator model aligns with our GitOps workflow.
